## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open QuaryLite and connect to a database
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / error messages

Paste any error messages from the app or from **View → Toggle Developer Tools → Console**.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. macOS 15.3, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- QuaryLite version: (shown in the title bar or About)
- AI provider: (Anthropic / OpenAI / OpenRouter / Ollama / none)
